channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Joe Rogan Criticizes Trump's Immigration Enforcement Tactics and Former Border Commander's Uniform
item.description: In a recent episode of The Joe Rogan Experience, popular podcaster Joe Rogan voiced strong concerns about the Trump administration's immigration enforcement strategies. During a conversation with scre...

item.title: Josephine Baker and Chiquita: The Famous Cheetah That Became Part of Her Public Persona

item.title: Trump Clashes With CNN Reporter Kaitlan Collins Over Questions About Proposed Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: President Donald Trump engaged in a tense exchange with CNN reporter Kaitlan Collins during a press event in the Oval Office on June 3, 2026. The confrontation began when Collins questioned Trump abou...

item.title: Minnesota Republican Elliott Engen Ends State Auditor Campaign Following DWI Arrest
item.description: Minnesota Republican state Representative Elliott Engen has ended his campaign for state auditor and instead filed for re-election to his legislative seat in White Bear Lake. Engen had launched his ca...

item.title: Rubio Defends Trump-Gifted Shoes During Heated House Hearing After Questions About the 2020 Election

item.title: Protests Grow in Albania Over Planned Luxury Resort Linked to Ivanka Trump and Jared Kushner
item.description: Thousands of people in Albania have protested against a proposed €4 billion luxury resort project associated with Ivanka Trump and her husband, Jared Kushner. The development is planned for Sazan Isla...

item.title: Justice Department challenges court order requiring testimony from top customs official in tariff refund case

item.title: House Republicans Highlight 'Trans-ing the Mice' Claim in Midterm Messaging, Drawing Criticism and Mockery

item.title: Shouting match erupts during House hearing over DHS Secretary’s use of government aircraft
item.description: A House budget hearing involving Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne Mullin descended into a heated shouting match after lawmakers clashed over his use of government aircraft. The confrontation occu...

item.title: Rare Photographs Highlight Paulette Goddard’s Role in Charlie Chaplin’s ‘Modern Times’ (1936)
item.description: Vintage Everyday published a collection of 38 photographs featuring actress Paulette Goddard during the production of Charlie Chaplin’s classic 1936 film 'Modern Times'. The article revisits Goddard’s...

item.title: Questions Arise About Trump's Public Absence Following Recent Medical Examination
item.description: An article published by Raw Story reports on growing online speculation regarding President Donald Trump's absence from public events following a recent hospital visit and medical examination. Accordi...

item.title: Study Finds Structured Yoga Program May Improve Sleep, Fatigue, and Mood in Cancer Survivors
item.description: A study presented at the 2026 American Society of Clinical Oncology (ASCO) Annual Meeting suggests that a structured yoga program may help cancer survivors improve sleep quality and overall well-being...

item.title: Senate Republicans Remove White House Ballroom Funding From Immigration Bill Amid Procedural Concerns
item.description: Senate Republicans have removed a controversial provision that would have funded security upgrades for President Donald Trump’s planned White House ballroom from a major immigration-related legislativ...

item.title: Senate Forms Committee to Engage Federal Government on Settlement of Contractors' Outstanding Payments
item.description: The Nigerian Senate on Tuesday take bold step by constituting a six-member committee to follow up with the Federal Ministry of Finance concerning the huge debts wey government dey owe local contractor...

item.title: DHS disputes allegations of hunger strike at New Jersey immigration detention center amid transparency concerns

item.title: Republican Primary Upset in Iowa Raises Concerns for GOP Ahead of 2026 Elections
item.description: A report from MS NOW has sparked concern among Republican insiders after a Trump-endorsed candidate suffered an unexpected defeat in the Iowa GOP primary for governor. According to the report, Rep. Ra...

item.title: Andy Burnham’s Potential Return Highlights Labour’s Struggle to Rebuild a Post-Brexit Electoral Coalition
item.description: The article examines whether Andy Burnham could help Labour reconnect with voters it has lost in recent years, particularly in areas increasingly threatened by Reform UK. Burnham, the Mayor of Greater...

item.title: Neurorehabilitation and the potential for recovery after stroke and brain injury
item.description: The article explores the work of neurologist Orlando Swayne, co-lead of a neurorehabilitation unit in London, and his belief that meaningful recovery is possible for some patients after severe stroke ...

item.title: Allegations of ethical misconduct and political interference involving Nevada U.S. Attorney Sigal Chattah
item.description: A report based on multiple sources alleges that Sigal Chattah, the acting U.S. Attorney for Nevada appointed during the Trump administration, has repeatedly violated Justice Department ethics rules an...
